storyHook: 开局匹配，协作通关，结算告别

narrative.when: 周六晚上八点，约好的联机时间
narrative.where: 甲的房间，电脑或游戏机前
narrative.who: 甲（玩家）· 乙（队友，语音联机）
narrative.how: 开局后用语音互相提醒配合
narrative.method: 开始游戏、互相提醒配合、闯过难关、结束后约下一局
narrative.event: 甲和乙这一关一直没通过，今晚想再试一次

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You ready?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, let's go.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Same man, same idea.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will pull first.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good, I will do damage.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Watch the red circles.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Got it. Move left?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, three steps.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: When you say so.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Three, two, one, jump!

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: We did it! That was a good run.
turns.zh: 我们做到了！这一把不错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, but that last bit was a shock.
turns.zh: 是啊，但最后那下真吓人。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My picture went still for a second.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I had to take the heat for you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks, man. Same time seven days from now?
turns.zh: 谢了，兄弟。一周后的老时间？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, same time. New level?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would like that. No more sharp bits.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We will be ready. I will get a better net.
turns.zh: 我们会准备好的。我换个好点的网络。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I will send you the list before then.
turns.zh: 好。到时候提前发你清单。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We are ready for the match.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Let us start now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good play. You did well.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Nice work. We won.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thanks. You too.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Okay, let us go.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, ready for the chief?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, let us go. I will pull first.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Watch the red circle on your left.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Got it. I will move now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. I will make you well.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks. I was feeling low.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Jump on three. One, two, three!

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: We got through. His cover is down.
turns.zh: 跳过来了。他的护具破了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now use your strongest move.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. He is almost dead.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: My box is fixed. I am not moving.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Get back! I will take the blows.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is working again. I am back.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Use all your power now. Quick!

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes! He is down. We did it!

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well done. That was a near thing.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Your quick move saved us.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I thought we were done for.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: My heart is still going quick.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Same here. Let's take a minute.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Then we go again?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, but not the same level.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. New place?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would like that. Something softer.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. I will send the note.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Ready? I will go first.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I am after you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Watch out! There is a hole on your left.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Got it. I jumped over it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Now we take down that great one.
turns.zh: 好。现在我们拿下那个大的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will keep it. You go at it from the side.
turns.zh: 我来拖住它。你从侧面打。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a good idea. I am moving now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is turning! Get back!

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is too near! I have not much blood left.
turns.zh: 那太近了！我剩下的血不多了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here, take this thing. I have one more.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Great, I am full again. Let us go on.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep still, it will make a jump. Get ready.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I see it. I will go to the side.
turns.zh: 好，我看见了。我往旁边走。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now! It is on the earth. Give it all you have!
turns.zh: 就是现在！它落地了。全力打！

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am about to do my strong move. Keep it still!
turns.zh: 我要放大招了。让它别动！

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will give it a shock. Three, two, one, now!

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes! It is down! But here come more small ones.
turns.zh: 好！它倒了！但是小怪来了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will take the small ones. You do the great one.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done! It is dead! We did it!

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well done, friend. That was a good fight.
turns.zh: 干得好，朋友。这场打得漂亮。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now for the last part. Are you ready?
turns.zh: 最后一部分了。你准备好了吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I am. Let us go together.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Watch out! Fire on your left side!

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see it. I will jump over it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Now go at it from the back.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am going. Keep it turned away.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will make a noise here. It will come to me.
turns.zh: 我在这弄出声音。它会过来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is coming to you. I am ready.
turns.zh: 它朝你去了。我准备好了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now! I have it. Do your strong move!
turns.zh: 就是现在！我控住它了。放大招！

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here it is! Take that! Yes, it is done!
turns.zh: 来了！吃我一招！好，搞定了！

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Great work! That was a good fight.
turns.zh: 干得漂亮！这场打得不错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Your timing was good. I was almost in trouble.
turns.zh: 你时机抓得正好。我差点有麻烦。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You did well to keep it off me.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I had to. You were not well.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us go again. I would make it quick.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, but let me get a drink first.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will keep my place here.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Back. Ready when you are.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us go quicker this time.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. No errors. Go!

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: We did it at last.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That last part was a near thing.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That was a smart play.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We almost lost that one.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: But you kept your head.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do another run?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Not now. I need a rest.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. Same time seven days from now?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. I will be here.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good play. Talk later.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, that was a good fight.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We won the game.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Your timing on the jump was right.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You too. I was shaking after the fire.
turns.zh: 你也是。火海之后我手都在抖。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will get a drink. You would like one?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, I am good. Thanks.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: We will do it more quick another time.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, if the net is better.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will see my connection before.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. See you then.

storyBlurb: 周六晚八点，甲和乙准时上线，誓要攻克卡了许久的难关。协作闯关，互相提醒，最终险胜后约好下周再战。
storyScript:
【开场·开始游戏】周六晚八点，甲的房间电脑屏幕亮起。他戴上耳机，语音里传来乙的声音，两人简短确认后，一同进入游戏关卡。画面载入，熟悉的场景再次出现——这是他们卡了整整一周的Boss战。甲深吸一口气，手指搭上键盘，乙在语音里轻声说：老规矩，我先拉怪。两人默契地开始了又一次挑战。

【进行·协作闯关】战斗一开始就异常激烈。甲操控的角色负责输出，乙则在前方吸引火力。甲的血条几次见底，乙及时丢来治疗技能，同时喊：躲开那个红圈！甲一个翻滚避开致命一击，反手打出连招。Boss进入第二阶段，地面出现密集的火焰陷阱。乙迅速指挥：左移三步，等我数三二一一起跳。甲屏息跟随，两人同步跃过火海，落地后合力释放大招，Boss的护盾终于碎裂。

【进行·协作闯关】最后一波攻击时，甲的屏幕突然卡顿，角色僵在原地。乙立刻挡在他身前，硬扛下Boss的狂轰滥炸，语音里传来急促的呼吸声：快退后，我来顶住！甲重启网络，角色恢复控制，他咬牙输出全部技能，Boss的血条终于见底。随着一声轰鸣，屏幕弹出胜利字样。甲摘下耳机，听见乙在语音里大笑：过了！终于过了！两人都瘫在椅子上，久久没说话。

【收束·结束复盘】结算界面跳出来，甲看着通关时间，发现比预计慢了三十秒。乙在语音里分析：最后那波卡顿太惊险，下周换个网络节点试试。甲点头，点开好友列表，给乙发去一条消息：下周六老时间？乙秒回：没问题，到时候开新副本。甲关掉游戏，窗外夜色已深，他拿起水杯，嘴角还带着笑意。这一关，他们终于翻过去了。
